description: The hollowNodeConfig struct has deprecated fields (UseRealProxier, ProxierSyncPeriod, ProxierMinSyncPeriod) that are still present in the code but marked as having no effect.
suggested_fix: Remove deprecated fields that have no effect to clean up the configuration structure.

description: The TODO comment indicates that hollow-node should be refactored into hollow-kubelet and hollow-proxy, suggesting technical debt.
suggested_fix: Complete the refactoring to separate concerns and improve maintainability.

description: The run function has multiple error return paths but some error handling could be more specific about the types of failures.
suggested_fix: Add more specific error types and handling for different failure scenarios.

description: The hollow kubelet creation and setup has multiple client configurations but lacks comprehensive retry logic for transient failures.
suggested_fix: Add retry logic with exponential backoff for client creation and API server communication.

description: The ContainerManager interface is very large with 15+ methods, indicating it may be violating the Interface Segregation Principle.
suggested_fix: Consider splitting this large interface into smaller, more focused interfaces.

description: The cgroup v1 deprecation warning indicates technical debt that needs to be addressed before removal.
suggested_fix: Plan and execute migration to cgroup v2 as indicated in the warning message.

description: The TODO comment about migrating kubelet to use internal objects or client library indicates technical debt.
suggested_fix: Address the TODO by standardizing on either internal objects or client library usage.

description: The kubelet.go file is extremely large (3480+ lines) indicating it may be a 'god file' with too many responsibilities.
suggested_fix: Refactor this large file into smaller, more focused modules following single responsibility principle.

description: The import section is very large with 50+ imports, suggesting the file has too many dependencies.
suggested_fix: Consider breaking this file into smaller modules to reduce dependencies and improve maintainability.

description: The proxy morph section creates multiple clients but doesn't have comprehensive error handling for cleanup if initialization fails.
suggested_fix: Add proper resource cleanup in error paths to prevent resource leaks.

description: The ContainerManager interface has methods that suggest complex resource management that could benefit from caching strategies.
suggested_fix: Review resource management methods for potential caching optimizations.

description: The hollow kubelet uses fake runtime and image services which could have different security characteristics than real implementations.
suggested_fix: Document security differences between fake and real services, especially for testing vs production use.
